releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release 1.1.3

This release focuses on internal code quality improvements, reducing dependencies, and better isolation of styles to ensure compatibility with other plugins and themes.

### Improvements
- Native Fuzzy Search: Removed the dependency on fuse.js and switched to Obsidian's native prepareFuzzySearch API. This reduces the plugin size and ensures search behavior is consistent with the rest of Obsidian.
- CSS Namespacing: Renamed internal CSS classes (e.g., .icon-card → .mermaid-icon-card) to use a dedicated namespace. This prevents style conflicts with other plugins or custom themes.
- Code Cleanup: Moved inline CSS styles to the external stylesheet for better maintainability.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toshs/obsidian-mermaid-icons/compare/1.1.2...1.1.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Refactoring & Security Improvements
- Security Update: Removed direct usage of innerHTML for rendering SVG icons. Implemented a safer 
setSvg helper using DOMParser to comply with Obsidian's plugin security guidelines and prevent potential XSS vulnerabilities.
- Code Quality: Updated ESLint configuration to align with the official obsidian-sample-plugin standards and fixed reported linting errors.
- Type Safety: Improved TypeScript typing by removing any usage and utilizing correct types (e.g., FuzzyMatch) from the Obsidian API.
- Styles: Refactored inline styles into styles.css for better maintainability.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toshs/obsidian-mermaid-icons/compare/v1.1.1...1.1.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
refactor: improve ESLint config, fix lint errors, and extract styles
- Update ESLint config based on obsidian-sample-plugin with stricter rules
- Fix lint errors in src/main.ts (remove any types, avoid static style assignment)
- Extract inline styles to styles.css
- Change icon insertion hotkey to Cmd+Shift+m to avoid conflicts
- Update README and README_ja.md with new hotkey

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toshs/obsidian-mermaid-icons/compare/1.1.0...v1.1.1
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.1.0 (2025-12-14)

### Added

- **Icon Insertion Dialog**: Added a new command `Insert Mermaid Icon` (Hotkeys: `Cmd+Shift+i`) to easily search and insert icons into the editor.
- **Icon Browser in Settings**: Added a "Supported icons" section in the plugin settings to browse and filter available icons.
- **New Icon Set Support**: Added support for `lucide` icons in addition to `logos`.
- **Linting & Formatting**: Added ESLint and Prettier configuration for code quality and consistency.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toshs/obsidian-mermaid-icons/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release v1.0.0

This is the initial release of the **Obsidian Mermaid Icons** plugin!

This plugin enhances your Mermaid diagrams in Obsidian by allowing you to easily embed a wide variety of icons.

### Features

-   **Font Awesome Support:** Correctly renders Font Awesome icons right out of the box. While Mermaid supports the `fa:fa-icon` syntax, Obsidian lacks the necessary font files to display them. This plugin provides them, making the icons just work.
-   **Expanded Icon Sets:** Adds support for the popular [SVG Logos](https://github.com/gilbarbara/logos) icon set via Iconify, allowing you to use hundreds of brand and project logos with the `logos:` prefix (e.g., `logos:aws-lambda`).
